text:
rgencies or when the cost to reduce the risk is greater than the combined consequence and likelihood of the risk occurring. Acceptance of any specific risk may be contingent upon implementing risk controls and monitoring.
CDC has and will continue to develop, implement and update policies and procedures that reflect its appetite for risk in pursuit of its mission.
Questions? 
Email ERM@cdc.gov .
